title: Plum cake
ingredients: Enough milk to fill measuring cup to 1 cup line
1 cup sliced fresh plums (can also use berries)
instructions: Sift together flour, baking powder, ½ cup sugar, and salt.
Break egg into measuring cup and beat slightly.
Add enough milk to reach the 1 cup line.
Add egg and milk mixture with oil to dry ingredients and mix well.
Pour batter into lightly greased 13x9 inch pan.
Layer fruit in rows and sprinkle with ¾ cup sugar.
notes: This is a very old recipe from my great-grandmother.
My grandma would make this frequently in the summer when fruit was freshly picked.
Yummy served warm with ice cream.
